headline: Samsung 85" M80H Mini LED (2026) — members save $180 (11% off), SKU 6671597. Biggest single member discount confirmed in the store today and the easiest big-ticket membership close.
objection: If they hesitate on membership: “Plus is $29.99 for the year — on this 85-inch alone you save $180 today, so the membership pays for itself many times over before it even leaves the store.”

financing.note: All offers are DEFERRED interest — pitch as “no interest IF paid in full by the end of the term,” never “no interest” flat (compliance). Interest backdates to the purchase date if not paid off in time. All require the My Best Buy Credit Card. Category terms re-verified on bestbuy.com today; thresholds and card offers reflect the most recent verified check.
cardOffers: Base rewards: 5% back on Best Buy purchases (6% back for Plus/Total members); 10% back on your first day of purchases when approved for the Card
🚩 LIMITED TIME — 1.5x rewards on ALL storewide purchases (Appreciation Event) — ends 7/19/26
🚩 LIMITED TIME — 2x rewards on RGB TV purchases — ends 7/26/26
🚩 LIMITED TIME — 2x rewards on TCL X11L Series SQD-Mini LED TVs — ends 7/26/26
🚩 LIMITED TIME — 2x rewards on select NETGEAR Whole Home Mesh Wi-Fi — ends 7/26/26
financing.pitch: Pair financing with big-ticket demos — lead with the monthly payment on major appliances, TVs, and laptops. Turn every big demo into a card app.

memberPerks.note: For My Best Buy Plus ($29.99/yr) and Total ($199.99/yr) members. Members earn 1% back in rewards on every Best Buy purchase (6% back when paired with the My Best Buy Credit Card), plus member-only prices, extended 60-day returns/exchanges, and free 2-day shipping. Total adds Geek Squad 24/7 tech support and product protection.
limitedTime: 🚩 Appreciation Event — member-only prices + bonus rewards, exclusive to Plus/Total members — ends Sunday 7/19/26
🚩 1.5x rewards on ALL storewide purchases (members who use the My Best Buy Card) — ends 7/19/26
🚩 2x rewards on RGB TVs, TCL X11L SQD-Mini LED TVs & select NETGEAR Whole Home Mesh Wi-Fi (members who use the Card) — ends 7/26/26
memberPerks.pitch: Lead with the Appreciation Event this week — it's member-only and ends Sunday, so it's the reason to sign someone up TODAY. Then remind them members earn rewards on everything year-round and the bonus multipliers stack when they add the Card.
